content.json:
## Version & Platform Analytics
Extension versions, host apps (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf), and adoption. **User** = distinct `user_Id`.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)
| order by Users desc
| render piechart
content.title: Extension Version Distribution

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Host = tostring(customDimensions.hostName)
| order by Users desc
| render barchart
content.title: Host App Distribution (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by UIKind = tostring(customDimensions.uiKind)
| order by Users desc
| render piechart
content.title: UI Kind (Desktop vs Web)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion), Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
| render timechart
content.title: Version Adoption Over Time (daily users per version)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name endswith "/extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Host = tostring(customDimensions.hostName), Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)
| order by Host asc, Users desc
| take 100
content.title: Version by Host Matrix

content.query:
let activeByVersion = customEvents
    | where name endswith "/extension.activated"
    | summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion);
let errorsByVersion = customEvents
    | where isnotempty(tostring(customDimensions.errorCategory))
    | summarize Errors = count(), UsersHit = dcount(user_Id) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion);
activeByVersion
| join kind=leftouter errorsByVersion on Version
| extend Errors = coalesce(Errors, 0), UsersHit = coalesce(UsersHit, 0)
| extend ErrorsPerUser = round(todouble(Errors) / Users, 2)
| project Version, Users, Errors, UsersHit, ErrorsPerUser
| order by ErrorsPerUser desc
content.title: Error Rate by Version (errors per active user)
